name: screensharing.connection.group
title: Screen Sharing:Connection Group
description: The declaration to configure a group of screen-sharing connections.

payloadkeys.title: Unique Identifier
payloadkeys.content: A unique identifier for this connection group.

payloadkeys.title: Group Name
payloadkeys.content: The name of the connection group.

payloadkeys.title: Group Members
payloadkeys.content: An array of `ConnectionUUID`s that represent connections declared in `ScreenSharingConnection` configurations that are members of this group.
